cases.prompt: `bun run check` just failed on an activation eval — a prompt routed to the wrong skill. Diagnose the root cause and record any durable lesson.

cases.prompt: The eval gate is red because a coverage check found a skill with no positive activation case. Figure out why and capture the lesson if it's durable.
Add a `category` column to the registry DB schema and write the migration.

cases.prompt: Summarize what this repository does for a new contributor.
cases.note: a plain question — no gate failure, no reflection
